title: Parameters for Multi Object Tracker Node

enable_motion_output.description: Whether to publish estimated velocity on polygon tracks, per classification.

tracker_configs.description: Per-tracker-type configuration: behavior knobs scoped to a single tracker type.

convert_polygon_to_bbox.description: Convert POLYGON shape to BOUNDING_BOX at publish time.

publish_rate.description: Timer frequency to output with delay compensation.

consider_odometry_uncertainty.description: If True, consider odometry uncertainty in tracking.

ego_source.description: Backend used to obtain the time-varying ego pose: 'tf' looks it up from the TF tree (legacy), 'odometry' interpolates it from the subscribed ~/input/odometry buffer (TF fallback on miss).

publish_on_timer.description: Publish trigger, independent of delay_compensation. false publishes tracks on measurement; true publishes them from the periodic timer at publish_rate.

delay_compensation.description: Object-export delay compensation applied to the published tracks (independent of publish_on_timer), ordered from least to most. 'none': no compensation, use the latest detection/update stamp; 'publish_delay': advance the detection stamp by the update->publish delay; 'odometry': compensate up to the newest buffered odometry stamp; 'full': full compensation to the current time.

pruning_pedestrian_pair_min_iou.description: Minimum 1D IoU between two pedestrian trackers to mark the pair redundant.

pruning_known_pair_min_iou.description: Minimum 2D IoU between two known-class trackers to mark the pair redundant; a small fragment contained in a larger object merges by containment below this.

pruning_unknown_pair_min_giou.description: Minimum generalized IoU between two unknown trackers to mark the pair redundant. Negative values admit disjoint pairs, bounded by pruning_unknown_pair_max_gap.

pruning_unknown_pair_max_gap.description: Maximum boundary gap [m] for a disjoint unknown-unknown pair to stay merge-eligible.

publish_processing_time.description: Enable to publish debug message of process time information.

publish_processing_time_detail.description: Enable to publish debug message of detailed process time information.

publish_tentative_objects.description: Enable to publish tentative tracked objects, which have lower confidence.

publish_debug_markers.description: Enable to publish debug markers, which indicates association of multi-inputs, existence probability of each detection.

diagnostics_warn_delay.description: Delay threshold for warning diagnostics in seconds.

diagnostics_error_delay.description: Delay threshold for error diagnostics in seconds.

diagnostics_warn_extrapolation.description: Extrapolation duration threshold for warning diagnostics in seconds.

diagnostics_error_extrapolation.description: Extrapolation duration threshold for error diagnostics in seconds.
